div1.entryFree:
Gear, 1) stuff: I'll grow a talker for this g. Merch. I, 1, 110 (i. e. for what you have said against silent people). if Fortune be a woman, she's a good wench for this g. II, 2, 176 (== respecting this article). Cupid grant all tongue-tied maidens here bed, chamber, Pandar, to provide this g. Troil. III, 2, 220. a dram of poison, such soon-speeding g. Rom. V, 1, 60. And in contempt, == dress: disguised like Muscovites, in shapeless g. LLL V, 2, 303.
2) affair, matter, business: to this g. the sooner the better, H6B I, 4, 17. I will remedy this g. ere long, III, 1, 91. come, shall we do this g.? R3 I, 4, 158. will this g. ne'er be mended? Troil. I, 1, 6. come, to this g. Tit. IV, 3, 52. here's goodly g. Rom. II, 4, 107.
